senses.def: one who talks too much, or a vacuum cleaner.
to change the subject of conversation.
effeminate male or sweet young thing.
to stutter or talk without coherence.
one who has been smartened up.
playing music in a torrid manner.
to improvise in a jazz band.
a lot of people or money.
a rhythm change in swing music.
to win the affections of the opposite sex.
dividing line between the North and the South.
to make facial gestures or attack.
most popular band at the moment.
five on a pair of dice.
large sum of money or place where it is kept.
string of pearls or marijuana cigarette.
a sharp weapon, usually a knife.
one who is tops in his profession.
a city block or term in jail.
playing number of piano bass keys.
to get into a bad predicament.
